ledger.title: Ledger
ledger.subtitle: Entries define operational state.
ledger.meaningNormal: Normal conditions indicates no unresolved entry.
ledger.meaningOutside: Outside authority indicates an unresolved entry.
ledger.meaningBeyond: Beyond scope indicates authority is absent for the domain.
ledger.meaningExposure: Exposure exists indicates entry has not been made.

assurance.title: Assurance
assurance.subtitle: Verification occurs within authority.
assurance.eventsOrderedBody: Every signal and action is sequenced. The system does not process outcomes out of order; causality is preserved so that what happened can be reconstructed and verified.
assurance.outcomesVerifiedBody: Completion is confirmed, not assumed. Delivery and reconciliation confirm that actions reached their destination and that external reality matches what the system holds. Discrepancies are detected and escalated.
assurance.responsibilityConcludesBody: Every responsibility has an end state. The system does not leave obligations open indefinitely. Closure is enforced so that a clear handoff or conclusion is available.
assurance.invalidStatesBody: Integrity checks run so that inconsistent or impossible states are detected. When something is wrong, the system escalates rather than proceeding within authority. Trust is replaced by demonstrable correctness.
assurance.relianceDefined: Reliance is defined by entry state.

goLive.carrierAttBody: Dial *72, then your Revenue Operator number. Wait for confirmation. To turn off, dial *73.
goLive.carrierVerizonBody: Dial *72 followed by your Revenue Operator number. Listen for the confirmation tone. To cancel, dial *73.
goLive.carrierTMobileBody: In the T-Mobile app: Phone → More → Call forwarding. Enter your Revenue Operator number. Or dial *72 + number.
goLive.carrierOtherBody: Most carriers: dial *72 or 72 + your Revenue Operator number to turn on call forwarding. Dial *73 or 73 to turn off. Check your carrier's support site for exact codes.
goLive.callerPriceHigh: Caller says the price feels too high
goLive.callerSpeakToSomeone: Caller asks to speak to someone else
goLive.defaultGreetingBook: Your operator will greet the caller, confirm what they need, and offer to book a time on your calendar.
goLive.defaultGreetingMessage: Your operator will greet the caller, gather details, and take a clear message for your team to schedule.
goLive.pricingNeverSay: Your operator will not give exact pricing (per your rules). It will explain that a human will follow up with a quote and capture contact details.
goLive.pricingEnabled: Your operator will share your saved pricing overview and then guide the caller toward booking or a follow-up.
goLive.pricingDefault: Your operator will explain that pricing depends on the situation, offer a rough range if appropriate, and collect details so your team can send a precise quote.
goLive.afterHoursForward: Your operator will explain that the office is closed and forward urgent calls to your transfer number, or take a message when forwarding isn't appropriate.
goLive.afterHoursMessages: Your operator will let the caller know you're closed, capture their name, number, and reason for calling, and confirm that someone will follow up.
goLive.afterHoursEmergency: Your operator will quickly check if it's an emergency and, if so, transfer to your emergency contact. Otherwise it will take a detailed message.
goLive.afterHoursClosed: Your operator will state that the office is closed right now, share basic hours if known, and invite the caller to leave a message.
goLive.afterHoursDefault: Your operator will check basic details, let the caller know your team is currently unavailable, and take a message for follow-up.
goLive.escalationWithTransfer: Your operator will stay calm, confirm why they'd like a human, and then transfer to your saved number when your escalation rules match.
goLive.escalationNoTransfer: Your operator will stay calm, explain what it can help with, and if needed, take a message with the caller's details for a human to follow up.
goLive.connectPhoneHint: Connect your phone number or activate for test calls and outbound only.

goLive.forwardExistingDesc: Keep your current number. Forward calls to your AI.

simulator.script0Line0: Thanks for calling! How can I help you today?
simulator.script0Line1: Yeah hi, I've got a leak under my kitchen sink.
simulator.script0Line2: I can help with that. Can I get your name?
simulator.script0Line4: Thanks Mike. Best number to reach you?
simulator.script0Line8: Is this an active leak or a slow drip?
simulator.script0Line9: Slow drip, but it's getting worse.
simulator.script0Line10: Got it. I have tomorrow at 10 AM or Thursday at 2 PM available.
simulator.script0Line12: Perfect! You're booked for tomorrow at 10 AM at 742 Elm St. I'll send a text confirmation right now.
simulator.script0Detail3: Issue: Kitchen sink leak — slow drip
simulator.script1Line0: Good morning, Maple Street Dental! This is Alex. How can I help?
simulator.script1Line1: Hi, I'd like to schedule a cleaning.
simulator.script1Line2: Of course! Are you an existing patient?
simulator.script1Line4: Welcome back! Do you prefer mornings or afternoons?
simulator.script1Line6: I have Tuesday at 9 AM or Wednesday at 10:30 with Dr. Martinez.
simulator.script1Line8: Booked! Tuesday at 9 AM with Dr. Martinez. You'll get a reminder on Monday.
simulator.script1Line10: See you Tuesday! Have a great day.
simulator.script2Line0: Hi, is this James? This is Emma from Summit Roofing.
simulator.script2Line2: You submitted a request on our website about 2 minutes ago regarding roof damage. I wanted to follow up right away.
simulator.script2Line3: Oh right, yeah. We had storm damage last week.
simulator.script2Line4: I'm sorry to hear that. Can you describe what you're seeing?
simulator.script2Line5: There are missing shingles on the south side of the house.
simulator.script2Line6: That definitely needs attention. We can send an estimator out tomorrow at 3 PM — would that work?
simulator.script2Line8: Great. Have you started an insurance claim yet?
simulator.script2Line10: No worries — our estimator can help document everything for your insurance claim while they're there.
simulator.script2Line12: Sending you a confirmation text now. See you tomorrow at 3, James!
simulator.script2Detail2: Issue: Storm damage — missing shingles, south side

productPage.answersEveryCallDesc: Your AI picks up on the first ring, 24/7/365. No voicemail. No hold music. Natural conversational voice handles everything from simple questions to complex scheduling. Whether it's 2 AM or your busiest hour, every caller gets the same professional experience.
productPage.outboundDesc: New web lead? Your AI calls back within 60 seconds. Appointment tomorrow? Confirmation call the evening before. No-show? Automatic reschedule. Customer hasn't returned in 6 months? Reactivation follow-up. Your AI follows up so your team handles work that requires a human.

productPage.leadsDesc: Every call auto-extracts name, phone, address, what they need, urgency. Each lead scored 0-100 on intent signals. Instant text + email notification. No more sticky notes or forgotten follow-ups.
productPage.appointmentsDesc: Checks Google Calendar or Outlook in real-time, offers available slots, books, confirms via text. Sends reminders before. Reschedules no-shows automatically. Calendar stays full without you lifting a finger.
productPage.messagingDesc: Two-way SMS from your business number. Auto-confirmations after bookings. Follow-up sequences for leads who didn't convert. Review requests after appointments. One inbox for all conversations.
productPage.insightsDesc: Call volume, answer rate, lead conversion, appointment completion, revenue recovered. Usage meter shows minutes vs plan. Monthly ROI statement: your AI captured X leads, booked Y appointments worth $Z. ROI: clear.
productPage.complianceDesc: Every call recorded and transcribed. HIPAA mode available. Retention 30-365 days. Full audit trail. Data export. Industry-ready documentation.
productPage.forBusinessesDesc: Solo operators to growing teams. Answer every call, book appointments, capture leads, and follow up — without hiring a front desk.
productPage.forTeamsDesc: Multi-location, agencies, and distributed teams. One platform, one standard. Consistent answers and full visibility.
productPage.forDevelopersDesc: API, webhooks, and integrations. Build Revenue Operator into your stack and keep every conversation documented.
productPage.complianceBody: Every call is recorded and transcribed. Governed records, audit trail, and chain of custody. HIPAA mode available. Retention 30–365 days. Data export and industry-ready documentation. When your industry requires it, Revenue Operator is built for it.

0.question: How fast can I be live?
0.answer: Most teams are live within minutes. Connect your number, configure your workflows, run a test, and go live. You can refine sequences and agent behavior after you see it working.

1.question: Do you offer flexible plans?
1.answer: All plans include full access to every feature. Cancel anytime.

2.question: Can I use my existing business number?
2.answer: Yes. Keep your current number and forward to Revenue Operator, or provision new numbers directly.

3.question: What exactly does Revenue Operator do?
3.answer: Revenue Operator is an AI revenue operations platform. It handles inbound and outbound communication, automated follow-up sequences, appointment booking, lead qualification, escalation to your team, and full revenue attribution. Think of it as the execution layer that runs your revenue operations automatically.

4.question: Does the AI sound robotic?
4.answer: Not even close. Revenue Operator uses 32 premium AI voices engineered with natural pauses, real intonation, pitch variation, and conversational warmth. Play a sample on our voice preview above and judge for yourself.

5.question: Who is this for?
5.answer: Any business or team that generates revenue through conversations. Solo consultants, sales teams, agencies, service businesses, clinics, law firms, real estate teams, recruiters, multi-location operators, and more. If you have leads, appointments, or follow-up to manage, Revenue Operator runs it.

6.question: Do I need to replace my CRM?
6.answer: No. Revenue Operator is the execution layer that sits on top of your CRM. It handles communication, follow-up, booking, and attribution. Your CRM stays as your system of record.

7.question: How do you prevent bad automation?
7.answer: Every agent has configurable guardrails: per-contact frequency limits, business hours enforcement, opt-out compliance, confidence thresholds, and human escalation rules. You can require approval before any action executes. Every action is logged and reviewable.

8.question: Does this work for outbound too?
8.answer: Yes. Revenue Operator supports 10 outbound campaign types including speed-to-lead, appointment setting, reactivation, quote follow-up, and cold outreach. Outbound runs with the same guardrails, compliance, and attribution as inbound.

9.question: How is ROI measured?
9.answer: Every call, follow-up, and booking is attributed to revenue outcomes. Your dashboard shows exactly what the system produced, broken down by workflow, campaign, and agent. Weekly digest emails summarize performance.

10.question: What if the AI makes a mistake?
10.answer: Full transparency. Review transcripts and recordings for any call. Adjust agent behavior, scripts, and escalation rules in real time. Run agents in sandbox mode to preview before going live. Every action has an audit trail.

integrations.zapierDesc: Use OAuth to connect your Revenue Operator workspace, then poll triggers or invoke actions.

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: Plans are billed monthly or annually. Annual billing includes two months free. You can change or cancel from Settings → Billing. Invoices are available in the dashboard.

api.title: API Reference
api.description: REST API for integrating Revenue Operator. All endpoints require a valid session (cookie) or Bearer token. Base URL: https://your-domain.com.
api.workspaceMeDesc: Returns current workspace and user. Auth: required (session or Bearer).
api.leadsListDesc: List leads for the workspace. Auth: required. Query: limit, offset, state.
api.leadsCreateDesc: Create a lead. Auth: required. Body: name, phone, email?, company?.

sdk.title: SDK Examples
sdk.description: Common operations in curl, JavaScript, and Python.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.entry202503: Campaign sequences (Call, SMS, Email, Wait), lead scoring, notification center, onboarding checklist, error reporting, SEO and accessibility improvements.
changelog.entry202502: Recall voice agents, AI phone number provisioning, activity and inbox views, settings hub.
changelog.entry202501: Initial launch: workspace setup, sign-in, pricing, demo simulator.

connectNumber.desc2: provision or connect a number, and verify forwarding. Once connected, run a test call so your agent can handle live inbound conversations.

createCampaign.desc2: choose an audience and sequence, then review compliance settings. When everything looks right, launch the campaign and track outcomes in analytics.

readDashboard.title: How to read the dashboard
readDashboard.desc: Start with the revenue recovered metric and the quick stats row. Needs-attention items show what your team should handle next, and the activity feed explains which calls led to each outcome.

configureAgent.title: How to configure an agent
configureAgent.desc2: to set your greeting, voice, knowledge, and behavior rules. Complete a test call and then enable go-live once the readiness checklist is met.

inviteTeam.title: How to invite team members
inviteTeam.desc2: and invite teammates with the appropriate role. They will automatically see the right workspaces and receive notifications based on your configuration.
